raw_8_compliance: PASS — analysis only, no .py/.sh/.rs/.toml created, no /tmp ephemeral python (only /tmp/inheritance_scan.txt as a transient awk-pipe scratch file consumed in-process).
@methodology_self_application_note: This cycle applies MT1 (carry_forward_origin field below cites the 2 source cycles explicitly), MT2 (uses ACKNOWLEDGED verdict for legitimately-out-of-scope falsifiers), #9-shape-PROVISIONAL (sweep prior witnesses, classify per-pattern, NO retroactive edits), and #17 self-application (top-level @methodology array). The ω-cycle being measured IS the ω-cycle measuring itself — recursive honesty.
carry_forward_origin: ω-cycle omega-cycle-quality-audit-session (2026-04-27 #9, sibling) → meta_tier_1_promotions[MT1, MT2]; AND ω-cycle omega-cycle-methodology-codification-from-meta-tier1 (2026-04-27 #17, sibling) → @methodology tag adoption proposal + 2 PROVISIONAL patterns (#9-shape, #7-shape).
scope_boundary: READ-ONLY meta-tracking. Inputs: 40 sibling design/kick/2026-04-27_*_omega_cycle.json witnesses. Outputs: this witness + per-cycle inheritance matrix. NO modification of any audited witness, NO atlas.signals/millennium edits, NO code emission.

intake.summary: Quantify how many today's sibling ω-cycles HONORED the 2 META-Tier-1 patterns (MT1 honest-chained-verification, MT2 ACKNOWLEDGED-verdict) promoted by ω-cycle #9 and the 2 PROVISIONAL patterns (#9-shape sweep-classify, #7-shape synthetic-harness-as-honest-substitute) + @methodology self-application proposed by ω-cycle #17.

patterns_being_tracked.MT1_honest_chained_verification: carry_forward_origin field at top level with explicit cycle citation (slug + date + role)
patterns_being_tracked.MT2_ACKNOWLEDGED_verdict: third verdict alongside PASS/FAIL in falsifier_outcomes for scope-boundary falsifiers
patterns_being_tracked.self_application_at_methodology: @methodology field at top level of witness (array of canonical pattern IDs)
patterns_being_tracked.synthetic_harness_pattern: cycle used a synthetic test harness (e.g. kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa) as honest substitute for live verification when live infra is obstructed

intake.discovery_method: Static grep over top-level JSON field anchors (^  "<field>") to filter out schema-discussion noise (a witness can mention a field 14 times in audit data without USING it once at top level). Synthetic-harness-USE distinguished from synthetic-harness-MENTION by requiring the harness to appear in a falsifier method/evidence context.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: all-witnesses-parsed
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: every 2026-04-27_*_omega_cycle.json under design/kick/ readable as JSON with no parse error
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: 40/40 witnesses scanned by grep (line-based, robust to whitespace); no IO failure; per-cycle row emitted in inheritance_matrix below

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: ACKNOWLEDGED-count-per-cycle-correct
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: ACK count uses precise pattern '"verdict": "ACKNOWLEDGED"' (allowing variable whitespace) and matches manual spot-check on hive-parent-sid-provider F6
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: 1 cycle hit (hive-parent-sid-provider, F6 — 'live spawn out of scope, helper resolves env gate only'); manually confirmed at line context match; no other cycle uses ACKNOWLEDGED verdict at any nesting

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: carry-forward-origin-field-detection-honest
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: count restricted to TOP-LEVEL field (^  "carry_forward_origin") to avoid inflation by audit cycles that mention the field in nested schema data; null values counted as 'present-but-explicit-no-parent'
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: naive grep gave 7 hits but design-kick-witness-schema-uniformity-audit had 14 nested mentions in audit data; filtered count yields 7 cycles with top-level field, of which 1 is null (carry-forward-dependency-graph-extraction explicitly null = root-cycle declaration, COUNTED as MT1-applied-honestly per spec) and 6 cite explicit upstream cycles

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: @methodology-field-detection-honest
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: count restricted to top-level field; mentions inside audit data (e.g. schema-uniformity-audit listing @methodology as a recommended field name) do not count as self-application
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: only omega-cycle-methodology-codification-from-meta-tier1 has top-level @methodology array (line 12: ["MT1", "#9-shape-PROVISIONAL"]); schema-audit's 3 hits are nested data points about the field; this witness adds the 2nd self-application

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: inheritance-rate-evidence-based-not-spin
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: report adoption ratios as raw fractions of 40 cycles, NOT inflated by re-counting source cycles or weighting by exemplar quality; LOW rates reported HONESTLY
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: MT1 7/40 = 17.5% (explicit cfo_top); MT2 1/40 = 2.5%; @methodology 1/40 = 2.5% (will be 2/40 = 5% after this witness lands); synthetic-harness-as-own-verification 5/40 = 12.5%. Honest assessment: PROVISIONAL patterns are NOT yet canonical-adoption-rate; only MT1 shows organic uptake among new cycles.

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: Intent-to-apply detection (would the cycle have applied @methodology if author knew?) is OUT OF SCOPE — author intent is unknowable from witness static text alone. This cycle classifies non-application as MISSED_OPPORTUNITY (not CANONICAL_REJECTION) per kick policy. MT2 self-application here.

fanout_axes.name: inheritance-detection
fanout_axes.method: static field-presence grep on top-level JSON anchors

fanout_axes.name: evolution-honesty
fanout_axes.method: missed-opportunity classification + exemplar identification, separating MENTION from APPLICATION

MT1_honest_chained_verification.honest_note: MT1 was formalized only by ω-cycle #9 today; many siblings preceded the formalization, so non-application is largely temporal not behavioral rejection. MT1 is the MOST UPTAKEN of the 4 patterns.

MT2_ACKNOWLEDGED_verdict.honest_note: Only 1 cycle uses ACKNOWLEDGED. Many cycles with scope-bounded falsifiers (e.g. live-spawn-end-to-end-via-remote-dispatch, kick-dispatch-rc-propagation-audit, mc-integrate-* triplet) could have applied it but instead used PASS-with-OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED or skipped boundary falsifiers. PROVISIONAL pattern; not yet canonical.

self_application_at_methodology.honest_note: ONLY the cycle that PROPOSED the tag has self-applied it. This witness is the 2nd. No organic uptake yet — pattern is single-source PROVISIONAL.

synthetic_harness_as_own_verification.honest_note: kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa was BIRTHED in kick-bench-witness-counter-live-verify when hive infra obstructed live verification. Pattern then propagated: 4 sibling cycles used the harness for their own F4 / F5 / smoke gates. This is the MOST ORGANIC of the 4 patterns, but specific to a single harness — not yet generalized.

exemplar_cycles_by_pattern.MT1_exemplar: bench-record-inner-rc-parse-fix — carry_forward_origin cites parent slug + date + specific carry-forward designator + behavioral delta ('parse __RC AND __HEXA_RC; per-record status=fail-inner-rc')
exemplar_cycles_by_pattern.MT2_exemplar: hive-parent-sid-provider — F6 verdict=ACKNOWLEDGED with evidence 'live spawn explicitly marked OUT OF SCOPE in tool docstring + this witness; helper resolves env gate only; downstream success depends on hive infra'
exemplar_cycles_by_pattern.synthetic_harness_exemplar: kick-bench-witness-counter-live-verify — birthed kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa as honest substitute when hive infra obstructed live verification; 7/7 PASS; uncovered latent macOS time-source bug as bonus

missed_opportunity_cycles_top_3.rationale: End-to-end live-spawn cycle with falsifiers that almost certainly hit scope boundaries (remote dispatch surface area is huge). Likely used PASS+OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED instead. ACKNOWLEDGED would have been more honest for boundary falsifiers.
Part of mc-integrate triplet (CLI / critval / RNG-backend) but no top-level carry_forward_origin field links the siblings. F=6 falsifier-rich cycle; would have benefited from explicit chain.

12 falsifiers, parent of runtime-hexa-rc-emission-contract-spec (which DID cite back via MT1). Could have flagged boundary falsifiers as ACKNOWLEDGED. Both directions of the parent-child link should carry MT1.

evolution_honesty_assessment.verdict: MIXED — 1 pattern spreading organically (MT1 + synthetic-harness-pattern), 2 patterns single-source PROVISIONAL (MT2, @methodology)
spreading_signals: MT1 has 7/40 (17.5%) uptake — the highest of the 4. Names like 'kick-bench-witness-counter-fix' (sibling fix cycle) cite parent design fanout cleanly, suggesting MT1 codifies an already-emerging norm, not an imposition.

synthetic-harness-as-own-verification has 5/40 uptake — pattern emerged organically when hive infra obstructed live verification (#7 origin), then propagated to 4 cycles within ~6 hours. Tooling-first rather than spec-first.
stuck_signals: MT2 ACKNOWLEDGED verdict has only 1/40 uptake — and that 1 is hive-parent-sid-provider, NOT a post-#9 cycle that read the methodology spec and applied it. May be coincidence (same author independently hit the pattern). PROVISIONAL is honest classification.

@methodology tag has only 1/40 uptake (the proposing cycle itself). Zero organic adoption by sibling cycles fired AFTER #17. This witness is the 2nd; if no sibling adopts within next 24h, classify as 'spec-without-uptake' and reconsider whether the tag adds value vs. being prose-only commentary.
Most cycles (28/40 = 70%) have NONE of the 4 patterns — meaning the 'methodology' is currently visible in 30% of cycles at best, and that's mostly via MT1 which predates formalization.
evolution_honesty_assessment.honest_conclusion: Methodology is NOT yet canonical-adoption-rate. MT1 reflects pre-existing norm; MT2 + @methodology are spec-without-uptake at <5%. Synthetic-harness-pattern is real but harness-specific (not generalized to a class). Recommend: (a) keep MT1 promoted; (b) leave MT2 + @methodology as PROVISIONAL until ≥3 organic-adopter cycles fire after the spec lands; (c) do NOT promote #7-shape (synthetic-harness) to canonical until a 2nd harness instantiates the pattern in a different domain.

inheritance_matrix.note: MENTIONS @methodology + carry_forward_origin in audit data; only carry_forward_origin USED at top-level
MENTIONS kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa but as audit context, not as own verifier
ORIGIN of synthetic-harness-pattern; should arguably have cfo_top to bench-orchestrator-smoke (MISSED_OPPORTUNITY)
PARENT cycle that PROMOTED MT1/MT2 — cannot self-cite, but did NOT add @methodology tag (predates #17)

carry_forward: If <3 organic-adopter cycles apply @methodology in next 24h (i.e. cycles fired after this witness, with no prompt-side instruction to add it), reclassify @methodology proposal as 'spec-without-uptake' and consider deprecating in favor of prose @methodology_self_application_note.

If MT2 ACKNOWLEDGED verdict does not appear in any organic-adopter cycle, propose downgrade to 'documented anti-pattern of PASS-by-assertion' rather than third verdict — the verdict slot may be wasted.

Synthetic-harness-pattern: watch for 2nd harness (different domain) within 7 days. If none, leave as kick_bench_freshness_smoke-specific tactic, NOT a generalized pattern. If a 2nd domain instantiates it, promote to canonical #7-shape.
Schedule re-fire of this tracking cycle in 48h to check for organic uptake delta — `meta-tier-1-inheritance-tracking-2026-04-29`.
